base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of simon_idle — a character (playable) from 1986 castlevania. Simon Belmont standing facing right — red leather body, brown whip coiled at hip. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Simon Belmont standing facing right — red leather body, brown whip coiled at hip; static pose used between actions. NES-restricted 3-palette (red/brown/skin)
